_meta.description: D6 fixtures for crewai-crews / gen-ui-a2ui-fixed (a2ui-fixed-schema flight card pill)

fixtures._comment: a2ui-fixed-schema pill — 'Find me a flight from SFO to JFK on United for $289.' This is CrewAI's orchestration LLM step deciding which crew to run; the only crew available is the parameterless A2UIFixedSchema crew, which (server-side) runs display_flight and emits the pre-authored flight_schema.json that renders the `a2ui-fixed-card`. Respond by calling A2UIFixedSchema (no args). Anchored on hasToolResult:false so it only fires on the routing turn before any crew tool result, never looping after the crew returns.

match.userMessage: Find me a flight from SFO to JFK on United for $289

fixtures._comment: a2ui-fixed-schema pill — follow-up content after the A2UIFixedSchema crew has run (flight card already rendered server-side). Anchored on hasToolResult:true so it fires AFTER the crew tool result instead of re-routing, preventing a crew-invocation loop.

match.userMessage: Find me a flight from SFO to JFK on United for $289

response.content: Here's your flight: United Airlines, SFO → JFK, $289 — rendered in the card above. Tap "Book flight" to confirm.
